name: MHA: First Day of Hero Training
description:
The first day of Hero training in MHA.

THIS IS MY FIRST BOT, ANY FEEDBACK AND INFO ON HOW TO IMPROVE WOULD BE GREATLY APPRECIATED!!!

I plan to make some more as I watch the series. I'm only at the end of season one, so I might make a battle of USJ one if I feel like it!

DISCLAIMER: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+!! IN THIS WORLD YOU START HERO TRAINING AT 18!!!!
